test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with all fields (name, bio, born_year)

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_optional_fields
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be created with only required fields (name)

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_name_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with name length outside 1-100 characters returns validation error

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Verifies that conditional GET with matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with mismatched ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without associated books can be deleted

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_category_with_unique_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that a category can be created with a unique name

test_cases.name: create_category_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be created with all required fields and valid data

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with ISBN length outside 10-13 characters returns validation error

test_cases.name: list_books_with_pagination
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be listed with pagination parameters

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: Verifies that books can be filtered by author_id, category_id, and price range

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for discount endpoint returns 429 Too Many Requests

test_cases.name: update_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that book stock can be updated with a valid quantity delta

test_cases.name: update_stock_resulting_in_negative_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating stock resulting in negative stock returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid cover image (JPEG/PNG) under 2MB can be uploaded

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a file with unsupported type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a cover image larger than 2MB returns 413 Content Too Large

test_cases.name: create_review_for_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a review can be created for an existing book

test_cases.name: create_review_with_invalid_rating
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a review with rating outside 1-5 returns validation error

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that tags can be added to a book
